target:
(My eyes are burning…
I feel like my head is splitting open…)
( I'm about to fall off the cliff!!!)

(There's a strand of seawater hair in my hand!!!
It came back from "just now"…!?
The battle has already started?!!)

(Is there no one nearby?
They've all already taken their positions…
I need to tell them this quickly…)

They already know everyone's positions!!
Get out of here fast---
It seems this is the end.

Congratulations on the bad ending.
Shinpei-kun.

(It's past 7:40 AM…
While I'm waiting for them in the schoolyard…)

(My back is to the second floor of the building,
and Nezu-san has a rifle ready and watching…)

Shinpei!
They're coming from the front!!
You've gathered quite a crowd, Shide.

You too…
Seems you've made some new friends, Shinpei-kun.

Everyone's hidden… 
Probably hiding somewhere.  
Trap?

Don't get close.
You guys are too cowardly to fight fair.
Let's stop the tricks and face each other honestly!

That's exactly what I want…
Mio-chan!
Sister, you transformed into a watch…

(Their target is my life!!!
 I'll be the bait and lead them!)

That hunter was hiding.
Shinpei… you're not worth killing…
You take care of that hunter.

Shinpei-san, Seawater,
Leave this to me and get inside quickly.

(…Even if I talk here,
you probably can't hear me…)

Here you go!!!
This is your moment, you guys!!

Watch out, Mio!!!
I'll take them down!!
No! I'm going to be killed--

Idiot…
You always rush in without thinking.

Go ahead and act out.
Like a bomb, quietly now.
(…Next, I'll use this sensor with a smoke bomb…)

Cough…!
(No voice…
My role is to drive them away.
And not be found at all!!)

(…While everyone else fights with their lives,
it's embarrassing to hide alone…)
(Do everything I can to protect the people on this island.)

…Oh? 
The fireproof shutter is closed, so I can't go up.
You're trying to lure us in?

What should we do? 
It's easy enough to break through.

No need for that.  
Shinpei is already in the plan's next step.
Then I'll do as you wish.

(I dodged it!!!
How could a bullet that was supposed to hit me…?)

Sorry, but I saw your move.
You're aiming for Shinpei-kun over there?
You saw through my aim for Shinpei-kun?

Just as I said, she shielded you, didn't she?
Even though you couldn't have known where I'd shoot.

(Whoa… He can see me…
His movement two seconds ahead of time…)

My shotgun…
Where did it come from…?

That old body…
You really have a good aim!!!
Mio, what are you waiting for?

If it's Mio-chan,
she's outside the window.
She's having trouble with Tokiko-chan.

No problem at all. 
Once I stop Tokiko-chan's shadow, it'll be over quickly.
Ros and Guild are already our kids.

The stray attached to Tokiko!!
Your connection with me has been severed!!

There's a strong presence behind us…
Shide is chasing after us!

What's that?!
Other shadows are mixing into Shide's body!

But it doesn't matter anyway…
I'll definitely take you with me.

(That's the power of Mio's shadow.
So flexible…
Mio has good coordination…)
(Ah… I want to keep watching forever…)

(That's Shide…?
It looks like a giant spider.)

Saying you'll fight honorably…
You're lying.

That's cruel… 
I actually believed it for a moment,
I'm pure, you know?
(They haven't noticed us on the second floor yet.)

I expected you to chase after me.
Even knowing it's a trap, you still follow,
acting so relaxed…
So that's why you're coming from above?!
(The fragments of Ushio's hair fluttered through the gymnasium…)
(Now all I need to do is light the match…)

(But if I mess up timing…
The gasoline vapor will be more effective once it's filled the room)
You thought of using gasoline, Shinpei-kun.
(Oh no, I need to light it fast!)

Oh my… 
You dropped the match, didn't you?

What a shame.
Without a match how would you light it…
Hehe, I got a good spot!!!

(You're here too, Totsumura-san!
You lit the fire with your bullets!!)

It's working!!! 
The hypothesis that shadows are weak to fire was correct!!!

Hehe, the whole floor is gasoline and a sea of flames!
There's no escape for them!!

(The shadow is peeling off from Shide…
And he's returning to his original four-armed form…)
(It seems that its monstrous form was formed by absorbing other shadows…!?)

Mm!?
His gun…
It's gone!? Where is it--

(Perfect timing, Ushio!
Now I'll take the hair you're holding…)
(The gun Totsumura-san had was a copy)

(When Heine aimed at Totsumura-san,
Ushio quickly erased the gun, and now I'm turning my hair into a gun)
(And then I shot Heine's 'original' body in the throat.)

(It's working!!! 
Shadows are definitely weak to fire!!)

(The whole floor is a sea of gasoline flames…
They have no escape!!)

Sorry, Dad… Mom…
It's hot but I'm okay.
If you kill him, we'll go back!!!
Don't look away if you're going to attack, Heine.

Don't let me go!
You have to disappear!!!

Forever pretending to be Shiori-chan,
smirking like that…
This fake!!
I've decided to stay in this body…

With this child… with this family.
Everyone will be together forever…

Heine!!!
You're crying, but I won't forgive you!!

Hahaha… you let your guard down.
Is it hot?

Ushio-chan…
Even though I can't kill you with fire,
you're going to die…

Well, even if it's just my thoughts…
You and Heine can carry over the information you have to the next cycle.

That means… data corruption,
and even 'death'…
You'll carry it over, won't you?

(Oh no… I have to save Ushio…
Ushio is going to burn up!!!
But my body won't move…)

It'll take a few minutes for Shinpei to die.
I deliberately avoided the vital spots, you know?

Ushio is here right now!
What happens if she dies before Shinpei…
It's really interesting to find out!

Even if I'm bad…
I don't want to die!
I have no intention of dying!!!

You're quick… 
I didn't notice you'd switched…

What I was holding…
It's a doll printed on hair strands.

You're not invincible…
I'll erase you!!!

(Now… I saw a human hand!!!
Someone's inside that thing!)

(…Heine??
How is he still moving in that condition?)

(The fire… it's gone!!!
In an instant!!!)

…Shinpei was fatally wounded by my bullets.
He should die in a few minutes, and then the final loop will begin.

Fufu… I'm fine…
I made a lot of copies, that's all.
There's no need to worry about me-

But blood is coming out!!!
You definitely can't hold it in anymore!

That blood is from the glass shards hitting me.
It'll disappear soon, and there's no burn mark!
Only my hair and them burned…

By the way Shinpei, you were shot!!!
That injury is much worse!!

Body armor…
I was wearing it under my clothes.
There are instructions online on how to make one.

Eh?!
D-don't hug me! Don't!!
It hit my shoulders and sides!

Ryunosuke, I'll record this explanation for you.
The fire caused by the copy of gasoline and matches is data,
and it was under Ushio's control.

She could arbitrarily choose what to burn, 
and the fire was harmless to buildings and us.

The fire was effective against shadows…
Normal shadows that had merged with Shide would die instantly. 
It also slowed down Shide's movements.

Furthermore, Ushio's 'hacking' accidentally revealed that someone was inside 
Shide's body.
However, Heine swept gym air, suffocating Shide… Building turned vacuum; they fled via gap. Failed to scan Shide’s true self…

However, according to Ushio's testimony,
there was no shadow presence from the hand 
and it was definitely a person.

Shide suffered burns on her left hand.  
This will be an indicator of their true identity.

Gases and liquids can be copied!
However, they need to be in a container! 
Otherwise I couldn't scan them properly.

Ushio could also copy the gasoline inside the can.  
If we consider the gymnasium as a container, it's possible.
But… even an enemy is amazing…

The gymnasium, such a huge scale to scan!
I don't have that power myself…
But the gains from tonight are huge…

Everyone is safe!
There's nothing more to do!!

Ushio, come this way!
Let's proceed as planned!

Double-check once more Ushio! 
If we cut the link with Heine, it'll be truly safe!

Yeah!
Just messed with my head…
It's fine if it becomes the same as me!

If I do this now, I can easily finish them off,
but is that okay with you Mio?
She captured my shadow and made it a comrade!!!
(At 7:40, I'm hiding in the shadows of the school building and holding my breath)

(Everyone else is waiting at their positions.
Ushio alone, deliberately staying in a visible spot,
waiting for the shadows to come)

(This strategy's success depends on teamwork…
First, I rely on you Ushio!)

Ushio!
They're coming from the front!!
They brought a lot of people, Shide!!

…Oh?
I thought I'd meet Shinpei,
but it's just Ushio…

There must be other allies.
You're probably hiding somewhere…
It's a trap?

Whether it's a trap or not,
you should check for yourself!
Come on, follow me!!!

That's really suspicious.
Heine, what do you think?

It's tag. 
Okay, let's take the bait.

Wait a second!
Mio, I'll take care of you!!!

Tetsu-san…
You shouldn't point that at people!
It's dangerous, isn't it?
What kind of speech is that from Mio who has a knife?!!

Mio's shadow…
That'll be my fight.

Exactly. 
Forgive me!
This is part of being a hero of justice!!!
(Toki and the others stopped Mio well!)

(Shide and Heine's presence…
Yes, they're following me properly)

(I need to lead them to that place,
but I'll keep as much distance as possible.)
(If I get caught, the 'trap' won't work anymore)

(The number of enemy shadows is more than expected.
But it's okay, there's something ahead…)
Come on, no matter how many there are!
Ushio-san, I'll take care of this!
(…Next is to use the flare to block the sensor here!)

(Seal off the fireproof shutter and cut off their escape route!  
We have to lead them all the way down that hallway!)

(Ajiro-kun, everyone… please be safe…  
Defeat those shadows!!)

(It's about time…  
Ushio is rounding the corner!)

Shide and Heine came with me.  
They should appear soon.

Understood.  
Then Ushio will hide in the shadows.
When I give the signal, move outside immediately.

Understood!  
Hurry and hide too, Shinpei!
(Those chasing Ushio will come around this corner)
(The hallway ahead is surrounded by us)
(Me, Nezu-san, Sou, Mio. We'll fight using copies of the rifles)
(But printing multiple rifle data at once isn't possible)
(But if we take turns, it can be printed one by one)

(Our sniper team has each taken a strand of Ushio's hair  
to materialize the rifles)

(When one person snipes, Ushio erases that rifle and immediately  
another team member with another strand prints it…)
(It creates the illusion of continuous fire! )

(Wh-What is that!?!  
It looks like a giant spider!)

(N-no, don't back down!!  
Everyone… stick to the plan!!)
(Move to the outside where we can see everyone, and prepare to activate the trap)

Well now.  
It's just a monkey's trick, isn't it?
Hm… let's see what they're up to first.

Hunter!!  
Out there… from the second floor!

(It seems it doesn't work on flat surfaces…  
Then I'll pierce through in 3D!!)

(This time it's the window!…)  
Keep your head, Sou!

Old body… Even though it's a nice rifle,
isn't your position too close?

From behind?!
Again with the rifle?!!

Nice shot, Sou!
Next is Mio… Stay calm!
Ah, I see. That's how it works…

(…Next should've been Shinpei,
but Shide's position now is too far)
(It's dangerous. Let me try again, Sou)
Where will it come from next…

Enough.
No need to deal with this nonsense.
Take them out one by one, decisively.
Then I'll start with the old body…

(Quickly assembled team,
first time using this rifle…
It was a gamble whether it'd work)

(This is thanks to everyone helping me so far!
No way I'm failing now!)

(I'll make this shot for sure!
Connecting these feelings to the future!!!)

(My position is still hidden.
From here, I can aim for Heine's 'original'!)

(Aiming at Heine's shadow…
The chance is only a moment!!)

(What just happened!?
The spider's arm moved so fast…)
KEY TIPS[<color=#GF_KEY_LOOPEND_SPIDER>Spider Form</color>] has been acquired.
